name: Testimonials
description: Customer testimonial cards with avatar, quote, and attribution. Supports grid, masonry wall, and scrolling marquee layouts.

slots.testimonial-card: Card container for each testimonial entry
slots.avatar: Avatar image of the testimonial author
slots.quote: Quoted text content of the testimonial
slots.attribution: Author name, role, and optional company badge

wall.description: Large masonry-style social proof wall with 6-12 testimonial cards and staggered scroll reveal.

marquee.description: Horizontal scrolling testimonial strip using Marquee component.

slots.testimonial-card: Fixed-width card for each testimonial in the marquee
Card container for each testimonial entry
slots.avatar: Avatar image of the testimonial author
slots.quote: Quoted text content of the testimonial
slots.attribution: Author name, role, and optional company badge

auradecantism.notes: Cards use d-glass. Quote text uses _fgmuted. Author name uses _fgfg.

preset_notes.wall: Cards use d-glass with staggered d-reveal. Section heading uses d-gradient-text.
preset_notes.marquee: Cards use d-glass. Track scrolls horizontally.

command-center.notes: Cards use cc-frame. Quote text uses cc-label.

preset_notes.wall: Cards use cc-frame. Section heading uses cc-data.

clean.notes: Standard card styling. No glass or gradient effects.
